title: GrowableOres Extension
description: A simple mod subsidiary of GrowableOres add a machine to help you process your ore cane.
body:
#### GrowableOres Extension requires GrowableOres;

#### A simple mod subsidiary of GrowableOres add a machine to help you process your ore cane.

#### Features and Functionality

This mod add a machine to help you process your ore cane to ore.
![cane_converter2.png](https://s2.loli.net/2024/10/05/5I79Ms8wcG4vHzy.png)



#### Recipes
![cane_converter.png](https://s2.loli.net/2024/10/05/cI6VvuHdPyU4mnG.png)




#### This mod supports:(Same as GrowableOres)

Applied Energistcs 2!
TechReborn!
BetterEnd!
Powah Rearchitected!
Modern Industrialization!
Industrial Revolution!
Thermal Series!
Create!
IC2 Classic!
Ad Astra!
Super Apple!
Maple!
BotanyPots!
Mekanism!
BetterNether!
Energized Power!

#### For the detailed information, please read the minute contents below. THANKS!!!
